title: Integrating Pexels Video Backgrounds for Reading Environments
first_prompt: Read this documentation for the Pexels API. I want to use it to grab video loops to use for the backgrounds of different reading environments. I want to try it using HTML first and then later in the i
summary: Irwin was working to integrate Pexels video loops into a reading environment's background, first prototyping the functionality using HTML before planning for an iOS Swift implementation. The conversation involved securing the Pexels API key and debugging specific features, such as fixing a non-functional "Toggle Blur button." The primary technical challenge was implementing a smooth cross-fade effect between background videos, which caused the background to turn solid black multiple times until the assistant simplified the structure and successfully resolved the issue using pure CSS.
